pi_items.source: Task description line 5: 'Save the exported file as /home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/account_export.csv'. Verified against export_result.sh line 20 which checks for this exact path.
Task description and verified in setup_task.sh (directory where portfolio XML is created) and export_result.sh (directory searched for CSV exports).

Source XML created by setup_task.sh contains 5 account-transaction elements (DEPOSIT, DEPOSIT, INTEREST, DEPOSIT, REMOVAL), resulting in 5 data rows + 1 header row = 6 total CSV rows. The minimum of 3 is reasonable and will be exceeded by the actual data.

Portfolio Performance Manual (https://help.portfolio-performance.info/en/reference/file/export/) confirms CSV export includes Date, Type, Value among other columns. All three expected columns are present in the export format.

privileged_info_summary: The task exports account transactions from a Portfolio Performance XML file containing 5 synthetic account transactions (3 deposits, 1 interest, 1 removal) to CSV format. The expected export path is /home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/account_export.csv. Portfolio Performance exports CSV files with columns including Date, Type, Value, Transaction Currency, Taxes, Shares, and others. The created account has 5 transactions, exceeding the minimum of 3 expected rows. All metadata claims are verified correct.
